title: Process for Selecting a Full Question from Module 5
description: A flowchart illustrating the logical steps a student should follow to select and answer one comprehensive question from the Compiler Design module on Code Optimization.
relationships: Start Decision leads to Review Available Questions
Review Available Questions leads to Assess Personal Knowledge
Assess Personal Knowledge leads to Evaluate Question Requirements
Evaluate Question Requirements leads to Make Selection
Make Selection leads to Answer Question
Answer Question leads to End Process
